events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from UCSF Medical Center for client 1022. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: renal, cardiovascular. Allergies: gluten. Sodium ceiling 550 mg/meal, carbs 45–75 g/meal. Prefers Chinese; dislikes coconut milk. Cooking ability: microwave. 10 meals/week, zone Visitacion Valley.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Steamed Fish with Ginger and Rice
events.detail: Excluded — diet order 'renal': meal lacks 'renal-friendly' tag.

events.title: Rejected: Buddha's Delight
events.detail: Excluded — diet order 'renal': meal lacks 'renal-friendly' tag.

events.title: Matched: Winter Melon Soup with Chicken and Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 354/550 mg ✓, carbs 45 g (target 45–75) ✓, no gluten ✓.

events.title: Matched: Chicken Congee with Scallions
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 364/550 mg ✓, carbs 49 g (target 45–75) ✓, no gluten ✓.

events.title: Matched: Overnight Oats with Berries
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 300/550 mg ✓, carbs 55 g (target 45–75) ✓, no gluten ✓.

events.title: Route assigned
events.detail: Client 1022 added to route R-VISI-1 (Visitacion Valley), delivery 2026-07-21, window 12:00–14:00. Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1022: 10 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 0. 0 hard-constraint violations.
